entry.message: [xule.buildIndexTime] Index build time 0:00:00.013628. - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1813744/000181374425000010/worldscan_q125o.htm
[xule.ruleDebug] Processing: DQC.US.0048.7482 - 15:53:39.257924 - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1813744/000181374425000010/worldscan_q125o.htm
[xule.ruleDebug] http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1813744/000181374425000010/worldscan_q125o.htm - http://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/1813744/000181374425000010/worldscan_q125o.htm

[DQC.US.0048.7482] The filing should include in the cash flow statement calculation linkbase(s) http://WDSP/role/Statement-ConsolidatedStatementOfCashFlows - 00000007 - Statement - Statement - Consolidated Statement of Cash Flows (Unaudited) one of the following elements as the root(first element) of the calculation tree to represent the aggregate change in cash for the period:
CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseIncludingExchangeRateEffect, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseExcludingExchangeRateEffect, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseIncludingExchangeRateEffectContinuingOperations, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseExcludingExchangeRateEffectContinuingOperations, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseExcludingExchangeRateEffectDisposalGroupIncludingDiscontinuedOperations, CashCashEquivalentsRestrictedCashAndRestrictedCashEquivalentsPeriodIncreaseDecreaseIncludingExchangeRateEffectDisposalGroupIncludingDiscontinuedOperations NetCashProvidedByUsedInContinuingOperations (As long as the element NetCashProvidedByUsedInDiscontinuedOperations is also included the reconciliation between opening and closing cash).
There are no calculations defined for the role(s) http://WDSP/role/Statement-ConsolidatedStatementOfCashFlows - 00000007 - Statement - Statement - Consolidated Statement of Cash Flows (Unaudited).
Rule Element Id: 7482 Rule version: 30.0.0RC1 - https://xbrl.fasb.org/us-gaap/2024/elts/us-gaap-2024.xsd 6720
